description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php:latest Docker image with a mariadb:10 service, defining MYSQL_DATABASE and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variables and caching the vendor/ and node_modules/ directories. All jobs inherit a before_script that runs: apt-get update -yqq; apt-get install gnupg -yqq; curl -sL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_8.x | bash -; apt-get install git nodejs libcurl4-gnutls-dev libicu-dev libmcrypt-dev libvpx-dev libjpeg-dev libpng-dev libxpm-dev zlib1g-dev libfreetype6-dev libxml2-dev libexpat1-dev libbz2-dev libgmp3-dev libldap2-dev unixodbc-dev libpq-dev libsqlite3-dev libaspell-dev libsnmp-dev libpcre3-dev libtidy-dev -yqq; docker-php-ext-install mbstring pdo_mysql curl json intl gd xml zip bz2 opcache; pecl install xdebug; docker-php-ext-enable xdebug; curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php; php composer.phar install; npm install; cp .env.testing .env; npm run dev; php artisan key:generate; php artisan config:cache; php artisan migrate; php artisan db:seed. In the test stage add a test-backend job that runs php vendor/bin/phpunit --testsuite=Unit --coverage-text --colors=never. Also in the test stage add a test-frontend job that runs npm test. In the integration stage add an integration-backend job that runs php vendor/bin/phpunit --testsuite=Feature --coverage-text --colors=never.
